trades.sentiment_summary: Omnicom and Interpublic (IPG) received unconditional antitrust clearance from the European Commission, marking the final regulatory approval for the acquisition, with closure expected by Wednesday[2]. Bank of America downgraded Omnicom to underperform on January 5, 2026, citing growth risks and potential earnings dilution from the $13B IPG deal, though no direct IPG-specific news in the last 24 hours[3]. IPG's current stock price stands at $24.57 as of January 2026, with Q4 2025 earnings reported on February 11, 2026[1][4].
